prompt: Ultra high quality professional monogram logo with editorial luxury feel. Two bold capital letters A and M overlapping in the center. The AM letters are deep olive green (#3D5A1E) with thick heavy weight. Behind them, a rotated square diamond frame with deliberately open corners — the four corners of the diamond do not connect, leaving small elegant gaps. The diamond frame is dark antique bronze gold (#996515), slightly thicker than a hairline but thinner than the letters. The open corners give it a modern editorial sophistication. Clean pure white (#FAFAFA) background. Maximum geometric precision, razor sharp edges, perfect symmetry. Ultra premium personal brand mark. Studio-grade graphic design execution. Completely flat design, zero gradients, zero shadows, zero 3D effects. Do not add any text, taglines, words, or decorative elements outside the logo.
negative_prompt: yellow, bright yellow, lemon, shadows, 3D, gradients, reflections, glow, blur, low quality, amateur, hand-drawn, sketch, watercolor, painted, cartoon, photorealistic, noisy, grainy, text, tagline, extra decorations, floral, organic, closed corners, fully connected frame, busy design, cluttered, rounded

settings.style: editorial luxury monogram, open-corner diamond, antique bronze
